Video.summary: Comedy writer Rob Petrie talks his wife Laura into leaving their sick son with a babysitter.
Video.title: The Sick Boy and The Sitter

Image.alt: The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter

Video.summary: Laura dyes her hair blonde when she fears the romance in her marriage is fading.
Video.title: My Blonde-Haired Brunette

Video.summary: Laura matches her cousin Thomas with Rob's co-writer, Sally, for a dinner party.
Video.title: Sally and the Lab Technician

Video.summary: While rummaging through Rob's old Army equipment, Rob and Laura recall how he broke her foot.
Video.title: Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced

Image.alt: Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced
Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced

Video.summary: Laura begins to worry when Rob has to work nights with a beautiful television star.
Video.title: Jealousy!

Video.summary: Complications ensue when Mel tells Rob that he wants Laura to dance on The Alan Brady Show.
Video.title: To Tell or Not to Tell

Image.alt: To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are dismayed by Millie Helper's jealousy of their new neighbors.
Video.title: Love Thy Other Neighbor

Video.summary: While anesthetized for a tooth extraction, Rob dreams he's a sheriff in the Old West.
Video.title: The Gunslinger

Video.summary: After five years of struggle, Rob finally finishes his first book.
Video.title: The Last Chapter

Video.summary: Stacey Petrie tries to save his new business from closing and his romance from ending.
Video.title: Stacey Petrie: Part II

Video.summary: Rob agrees to have a popular British singing duo spend the night at his home.
Video.title: The Redcoats Are Coming

Video.summary: Buddy and Rob run a shoe store they've invested in after chasing off its only full-time salesman.
Video.title: Young Man with a Shoehorn

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are in a quandary over how Ritchie can protect himself from a girl.
Video.title: Girls Will Be Boys

Video.summary: Rob recalls the time he and Jerry tried to buy the same house.
Video.title: Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home

Image.alt: Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home
Your Home Sweet Home Is My Home

Video.summary: Sally's new boyfriend is secretive about what he does for a living.
Video.title: Anthony Stone

Video.summary: The Petries' second honeymoon becomes a disaster when Laura's toe gets caught in a bath spout.
Video.title: Never Bathe on Saturday

Video.summary: Rob and Laura have no choice but to wear gloves to an important community banquet.
Video.title: Show of Hands

Video.summary: Alan needs Rob's help improving a script for his Broadway debut.
Video.title: Baby Fat

Video.summary: Buddy offers to help Laura get a fur coat for the wholesale price.
Video.title: There's No Sale Like Wholesale

Video.summary: Laura blurts out an embarrassing secret on a national television quiz show.
Video.title: Coast to Coast Big Mouth

Video.summary: Millie and Laura become two terrible stage-mothers when Rob agrees to hire Ritchie for a commercial.
Video.title: Boy #1, Boy #2

Video.summary: Rob learns that a song he helped write is about to become a hit.
Video.title: Bupkis

Video.summary: Rob recalls his first meeting with Alan Brady during a stay-awake marathon for his disc-jockey job.
Video.title: One Hundred Terrible Hours

Video.summary: Rob invites an old Army pal home to dinner but begins to fear he has a jewel thief on his hands.
Video.title: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO

Image.alt: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO

Video.summary: Rob sees a flying saucer but nobody believes him.
Video.title: Uhny Uftz

Video.summary: Rob and Laura recall their courtship days, when Rob almost lost Laura to another man.
Video.title: No Rice at My Wedding

Video.summary: Laura regrets enrolling Rob into art lessons after the teacher appears to show an interest in him.
Video.title: Draw Me a Pear

Video.summary: Rob almost earns $500 because the freckles on his back are in the shape of the Liberty Bell.
Video.title: Odd But True

Video.summary: Rob and Laura find out that Ritchie has been telling stories in school.
Video.title: Go Tell the Birds and the Bees

Image.alt: Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees
Go Tell the Birds and the Bees

Video.summary: Rob recalls the time he defended his title as middleweight champion of the Army camp.
Video.title: Body and Sol

Video.summary: Rob goes out to cool off after a quarrel with Laura and winds up in trouble.
Video.title: You're Under Arrest

Video.summary: Laura gives Rob an expensive watch at his birthday party, but the watch goes missing.
Video.title: Who Stole My Watch

Video.summary: Rob can't make up his mind when asked to be a candidate for the city council.
Video.title: I Do Not Choose to Run

Image.alt: I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run
I Do Not Choose to Run

Video.summary: Rob agrees to run for office but realizes he'd prefer to vote for his brainy opponent.
Video.title: The Making of a Councilman

Video.summary: When Mel Cooley takes Rob's advice and stands up to Alan Brady, he is promptly fired.
Video.title: The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart

Image.alt: The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart
The Bottom of Mel Cooley's Heart

Video.summary: Sally advertises for a husband on a national television show and is flooded with fan mail.
Video.title: Dear Sally Rogers

Video.summary: Buddy's behavior leads Rob and Sal to believe he's seeing a psychiatrist or having an affair.
Video.title: Buddy Sorrell: Man and Boy

Video.summary: Rob, Sally and Buddy learn that Alan Brady is cutting down his writing staff.
Video.title: Talk to the Snail

Video.summary: Rob, Buddy and Sally are in trouble when their script insults the boss.
Video.title: Obnoxious, Offensive, Egomaniac, Etc.

Video.summary: The Petrie home becomes a command post when government agents move in.
Video.title: The Man from My Uncle

Video.summary: Rob is cast in a low-budget film and turns out to be the screen's worst lover.
Video.title: You Ought to Be in Pictures

Image.alt: You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures
You Ought to Be in Pictures

Video.summary: Rob sets out to write a book during his vacation but has trouble getting started.
Video.title: A Farewell to Writing

Video.summary: Rob's dreams of inheriting a fortune seem dashed when he gets an old desk.
Video.title: The Great Petrie Fortune

Video.summary: Rob and Laura clash over which of them is the better writer of a children's story.
Video.title: See Rob Write, Write Rob Write

Image.alt: See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write
See Rob Write, Write Rob Write

Video.summary: Rob's parents give a family heirloom to Laura, who accidentally ruins it.
Video.title: The Curse of the Petrie People

Image.alt: The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People
The Curse of the Petrie People

Video.summary: Rob has to find a television set to watch a TV show for Alan Brady.
Video.title: Bad Reception in Albany
